description_long: This object is a banana peel with three distinct, elongated sections splayed outward, resembling a classic cartoon-style banana peel. The peel is predominantly yellow with brownish discoloration at the tips and along the edges, suggesting some age or bruising. The central stem is upright and slightly tapered, with a subtle brown spot at the top. The interior of the peel is lighter in color, almost white, and is visible where the peel sections separate. The surface appears slightly glossy and smooth, with gentle curves and natural folds typical of a real banana peel. There are no visible stickers, tears, or major blemishes, and the peel maintains its structural integrity.
description: A yellow banana peel with three splayed sections, brown tips, and a slightly glossy, smooth surface. The interior is pale and the stem is upright with minor discoloration.
description_view_0: The banana peel is seen from a low angle, showing all three sections spread out and the upright stem, with brown tips visible.
description_view_1: Viewed from the side, the peel's central section is most prominent, and the left and right sections curve outward, revealing the pale interior.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the arch of the central section and the spread of the other two, with the stem clearly visible.
description_view_3: From above, the three sections are clearly splayed, and the overall curvature and width of the peel are most apparent.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peel is intact with minor brown discoloration at the tips and edges, but no visible tears or splits. The surface appears smooth with some natural folds and creases.
